name: Salmon-Cucumber Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the salmon, yogurt cheese, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic salt, seasoned pepper, and tarragon.
2. Blend well until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
3. Cover and store in the refrigerator for up to 2-3 days.
4. When ready to serve, spoon the salmon mixture into a pastry tube fitted with a wide tip.
5. Pipe the mixture onto cucumber slices.
6. Garnish each cucumber slice with an olive.
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 25 calories, 3 g. protein, 1 g. carbohydrates, 1 g. fat, 0 g. dietary fiber, 6 mg. cholesterol, 158 mg. sodium.
Calories from fat: 16%
Original recipe from Modern Maturity, April-May 1993
Conversion and additional nutritional analysis by Rick Weissgerber [GEnie D.WEISSGERBE]
